official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound set_equipment body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_equipment to packet id 0x66.
The generated fixture uses entity id 123, one MAINHAND entry, and ItemStack.EMPTY only.
Official ItemStack.OPTIONAL_STREAM_CODEC writes VarInt count 0 for ItemStack.EMPTY and only decodes item registry/component patch data for positive counts.
